events.text: Goal!  Tunisia 0, England 1. Harry Kane (England) right footed shot from the right side of the six yard box to the centre of the goal    following a corner.
Kyle Walker (England) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Tunisia 1, England 1. Ferjani Sassi (Tunisia) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom left corner.
Goal!  Tunisia 1, England 2. Harry Kane (England) header from the left side of the six yard box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Harry Maguire   following a corner.
